goal: Replace placeholder CLAUDE.md with real content, create lazy-loaded .claude/skills/ directory, add auto-compaction safety net

tasks.name: Rewrite CLAUDE.md with real project content
tasks.action: Replace all placeholder content with real cnogo project instructions. Inline Karpathy principles as 4 bullet points. Remove skills.md reference. Target ~100 lines.
verify: python3 -c "content=open('CLAUDE.md').read(); assert '[' not in content or 'forrestchang' in content, f'Found placeholder brackets'; print('OK: no placeholders')"

tasks.name: Create .claude/skills/ from docs/skills.md
tasks.action: Extract each domain skill from docs/skills.md into standalone .claude/skills/ files. Each 15-30 lines. No Memory Engine boilerplate.

tasks.name: Add auto-compaction to settings.json
tasks.action: Add CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE=60 to env section in settings.json.

commitMessage: refactor(agent-architecture): context foundation — CLAUDE.md, skills, auto-compaction
